# Startup Script (init.ts)

Fresh auto-loads `~/.config/fresh/init.ts` at startup — TypeScript with the full plugin API, for the things that depend on where and how Fresh is starting. Run **init: Edit** from the command palette to open it with a starter template; **init: Reload** re-runs without restarting.
